projectDescription: A TypeScript SDK and MCP server for adding private DeFi to Solana apps — shield tokens, swap privately via Jupiter, and lend on Kamino without revealing your wallet on-chain.
keyFeatures: Shield SPL tokens into a private shielded pool with a single transaction
Private token swaps via Jupiter routing — relayer pays gas, wallet stays off-chain
Private lending and redemption on Kamino V2 USDC reserves with per-user obligations
Gasless unshield to any Solana address with sender→recipient unlinkability
MCP server for IDE-native private DeFi operations in Claude Code and Cursor
Groth16 ZK proofs binding spend authority without revealing which note was spent
Composable adapter system — any Solana protocol can be added without circuit changes
publicApiSurface: B402Solana class (constructor, ready, shield, unshield, privateSwap, walletBalance)
MCP tools: shield, unshield, private_swap, private_lend, private_redeem, status, holdings, balance, quote_swap, watch_incoming
